productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Ferrari LS Portable Black Bags
description: The ferrari LS Portable from puma has v"room" to spare with its multiple pockets and sleek design. It has an adjustable webbing shoulder strap with a belt buckle closure, complemented by motorsport details and brushed silver metal hardware. Signature Ferrari elements include a shield on the front centre, an Italian flag label and contrast color stitching. Length: 20 cm Made of high end polymer with two chambers One main chamber with a zip, slip and mobile phone pockets Sub chamber on the front with a velcro fastener Handle design with a belt buckle Stitch detailing for enhanced durability Brushed silver hardware, and special motorsport designed zip pullers Ferrari shield and Italian flag label puma Leaping cat logo in metal appliquéd on the front Ferrari Original Logo embroidery on the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
